description: A property management company is updating the community rules for an apartment complex (e.g., new pool hours).

nodes.task_description: Draft the updated community rules and regulations document.

expected_outcome.value: A revised document with the new rule changes is created.

nodes.task_description: Distribute the updated rules to all current residents as required by law or the lease agreement.

expected_outcome.value: The new rules document is sent via email to all tenants in the complex.

nodes.task_description: Update the new resident onboarding package to include the new version of the rules.

expected_outcome.value: The template for new lease packages is updated with the latest rules document.
